---
title: "test_adc.js"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\scripts\test_adc.js"
loc: 19
complexity: 2
logic_score: 9.15
style_score: 4.18
intel_score: 1.40
overall_score: 3.91
---

## Intent
The `test_adc.js` sector implements modular logic focusing on testADC, ai, result. It forms a node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via testADC, ai, result. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 9.2/10
- **Style [S]**: 4.2/10
- **Intel [I]**: 1.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 0 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [GoogleGenAI](file://@google/genai)
- [*](file://dotenv)
- [*](file://node:path)

### Exports
- `testADC`
- `ai`
- `result`
